title: eidolons.yaml
description: Per-project Eidolons manifest. Commit to VCS.

wire.description: Hosts to wire during install/sync. Auto-detected during init if omitted.

shared_dispatch.description: Whether to inject the cortex + dispatch-pointer block into root vendor docs.

strict.description: Hard-fail on missing pointer_targets paths (default: warn-only).

pointer_targets.description: Vendor files that receive the EIDOLONS dispatch-pointer + cortex block. Optional; defaults to files derived from hosts.wire.

name.description: Lowercase Eidolon slug (must exist in nexus roster).

source.description: Optional override: github:owner/repo or git URL. Defaults to roster entry.

target.description: Optional install target override. Defaults to ./.eidolons/<n>/.

host_tier.description: Declarative host capability tier. 'thinking' enables loop-native coders (e.g. Vivi) as the default for their class; 'standard' (or absent) falls back to the conservative coder (APIVR-Δ). NOT auto-detected; set explicitly by the project owner.

context.description: ECM P1 context-lifecycle kernel configuration (spec §7). Optional; absent means ECM is off (opt-in, additive — same class as the existing 'hosts' block).

thresholds.description: Override amber/red/critical zone boundaries down, not up past host limits.

pins_extra.description: Project pins appended to the nexus defaults (roster/pins.yaml). Never shrinks the default set.

composition.description: Documentation of intended pipeline. Not enforced by the CLI.

models.description: Consumer-side model configuration: active profile, per-tier calibration overrides, and per-member tier/pin overrides.

profile.description: Active profile name (must exist in roster/model-profiles.yaml). Defaults to roster default_profile.

calibration.description: Per-tier model override within the active profile.

members.description: Per-member tier override and/or concrete model pin.

tier.description: Per-member tier override (still resolves via profile/calibration).

model.description: Concrete model PIN — highest precedence. Ignores tier/profile/calibration entirely.
